bugs.error_message: make validate failed because python -m parallax_contracts.validation could not find the parallax_contracts package
bugs.root_cause: pytest had pythonpath configuration, but the Makefile validation command did not set PYTHONPATH for local package directories.
bugs.fix: Set PYTHONPATH=packages/contracts:packages/db:services/api for the contract validation command.

bugs.error_message: User correction: infrastructure reasoning inferred from existing GPU-node layout before grounding in canonical Parallax ZFS artifacts.
bugs.root_cause: I inspected node precedent before making the canonical ZFS artifact plan/script the governing source for Parallax storage decisions.
bugs.fix: Recorded a durable rule to review relevant canonical artifacts first, and specifically to use the Parallax ZFS plan/script for GPU-node storage setup.

bugs.error_message: make validate failed with manifest missing entries: ['.DS_Store', 'infrastructure/.DS_Store']
bugs.root_cause: macOS metadata files were created inside the canonical artifact pack and were not present in the pack manifest.
bugs.fix: Removed the generated .DS_Store files and kept .DS_Store ignored so pack validation passes.

bugs.error_message: sudo: a terminal is required to read the password; either use the -S option to read from standard input or configure an askpass helper
bugs.root_cause: Remote sudo was executed over SSH without allocating a TTY; trying local sudo before ssh prompts for the Mac password and does not satisfy the GPU-node sudo prompt.
bugs.fix: Use ssh -tt for remote sudo commands, for example ssh -tt ... 'sudo -v && sudo <command>'.
